ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "listing_price" TEXT /* Listing price of the property */,
  "closing_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the property */,
  "living_ft2" INTEGER /* Living area of the property in square feet */,
  "cost_per_ft2" TEXT /* Cost per square foot of the property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property location */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, needs repair) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., listed, sold, off market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "typical_features" TEXT /* Typical features of the property type */,
  "average_price_range" TEXT /* Average price range for the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., bedrooms, bathrooms) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., structural, location, amenities) */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_attributes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the sale belongs to */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Closing date of the sale */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the property */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "average_property_value" TEXT /* Average property value in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the agent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend data */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average property price */,
  "total_sales_volume" TEXT /* Total sales volume */,
  "number_of_sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
